items.title: 主线结论（系统版｜条件触发）
items.summary:
- 主导因素：10年期利率 + 原油价格/风险事件
- 四件套监控：10年期利率（方向/拐点）｜美元指数（强弱）｜VIX（是否抬升）｜原油价格/风险事件（是否升级）
- 跨资产联动：10年期利率上升→NQ/ES承压更明显；美元指数上升→黄金更易回撤；VIX上升→盘中更易急拉急杀/假突破
- 未来90分钟关键窗口：关注是否临近数据/讲话/美债拍卖/开盘等事件窗；事件前后避免追单
- 情景A：若10年期利率继续上行且VIX抬升→偏NQ/ES先空后看、GC偏弱震荡；操作偏好：等确认后顺势
- 情景B：若10年期利率回落且VIX回落→偏NQ/ES修复反弹、GC喘息；操作偏好：回踩参与、避免追高
- 期权：事件密度高→偏买波动/带保护；事件窗过去且VIX回落→再
items.summary_en:
- 主导因子：10Y/利率 + 原油/风险事件
- 四件套监控：10Y（方向/拐点）｜DXY（强弱）｜VIX（是否抬升）｜原油/风险事件（是否升级）
- 跨资产联动：10Y↑→NQ/ES承压更明显；DXY↑→GC更易回撤；VIX↑→盘中更易急拉急杀/假突破
- 未来90分钟关键窗口：关注是否临近数据/讲话/美债拍卖/开盘等事件窗；事件前后避免追单
- 情景A：若10Y继续上行且VIX抬升→偏NQ/ES先空后看、GC偏弱震荡；操作偏好：等确认后顺势
- 情景B：若10Y回落且VIX回落→偏NQ/ES修复反弹、GC喘息；操作偏好：回踩参与、避免追高
- 期权：事件密度高→偏买波动/带保护；事件窗过去且VIX回落→再考虑卖波动
- ——
- 地缘/避险线索：Stock market today: Dow, S&P 500, Nasdaq wobble after rally as Iran war …
- 宏观/Fed线索：Best high-yield savings interest rates today, March 24, 2026 (Earn up to…

items.title: 五角大楼对Anthropic的禁令将面临审判；Claude AI制造商寻求禁令
items.summary: 国防部将Anthropic列为美国国家安全的风险，标志着第一家受此类评估的美国公司。
items.title_en: Pentagon ban of Anthropic faces judge; Claude AI maker seeks injunction
items.summary_en: The Defense Department designated Anthropic as a risk to U.S. national security, the first time an American company had been hit with that designation.

items.title: Gap表示将在谷歌的Gemini中推出自助结算功能，这是时尚行业一家主要公司首次采用人工智能技术。
items.summary: 在专营零售领域竞争日益激烈的情况下，Gap与Gemini的合作以及其面向客户的AI工具为其带来了竞争优势。
items.title_en: Gap says it will launch checkout within Google's Gemini, in an AI first from a major fashion company
items.summary_en: Gap's partnership with Gemini and its customer-facing AI tools give it a competitive edge at a time when winning in specialty retail is harder than ever.

items.title: 联邦快递与OneRail合作推出同日送达服务，亚马逊和沃尔玛加快了送货速度。
items.summary: 联邦快递宣布与末端配送公司OneRail合作，为所有客户提供同日送达服务。
items.title_en: FedEx launches same-day delivery with OneRail as Amazon, Walmart boost their speeds
items.summary_en: FedEx announced it's partnering with last-mile delivery company OneRail to bring same-day delivery to all of its customers.

items.title: 亚马逊的Zoox计划今年晚些时候在奥斯汀和迈阿密推出无人出租车。
items.summary: 这是亚马逊自主驾驶单位Zoox的最新扩张，去年该单位在拉斯维加斯和旧金山的一些地区向公众开放了乘坐服务。
items.title_en: Amazon's Zoox to debut robotaxis in Austin, Miami later this year as it awaits paid ride approval
items.summary_en: It marks the latest expansion for Amazon's Zoox self-driving unit, which opened rides to the public in some parts of Las Vegas and San Francisco last year.

items.title: 阿里巴巴公布新一代专为"代理"设计的AI芯片
items.summary: 虽然人们对GPU的关注度很高，NVIDIA在此领域占据了主导地位，但CPU被认为是关键的AI推理和代理人。
items.title_en: Alibaba reveals new AI chip designed for 'agents'
items.summary_en: While much of the attention has focused on GPUs, an area Nvidia dominates, CPUs are seen as key for AI inferencing and agents.

items.title: Anthropic称Claude现在可以使用您的电脑来完成任务以推动人工智能代理
items.summary: Anthropic及其竞争对手正试图提高AI代理的能力，之前今年的OpenClaw事件引发了广泛关注。
items.title_en: Anthropic says Claude can now use your computer to finish tasks for you in AI agent push
items.summary_en: Anthropic and its rivals are trying to ramp up capabilities of AI agents after OpenClaw went viral earlier this year.

items.title: OpenAI 在即将上市前的一份投资者文件中指出，Microsoft 依赖性是其风险之一。
items.summary: OpenAI在一份类似IPO招股说明书的文件中，突出了其对Microsoft的依赖风险，以及对TSMC供应链的中断风险。
items.title_en: OpenAI calls out Microsoft reliance as risk in investor document ahead of expected IPO
items.summary_en: In a document that resembles an IPO prospectus, OpenAI highlighted the risk of its dependence on Microsoft and of supply disruptions at TSMC.

items.title_en: Synopsys shares rally as activist Elliott builds multibillion-dollar stake in chip design firm
items.summary_en: Elliott did not disclose the exact value of its investment, but described Synopsys as "essential to the global chip industry."

items.title: 全球原油价格以每桶103美元的价格交易，据报道沙特阿拉伯和阿联酋正在考虑加入对伊朗的战争。

items.summary_en: U.S. allies in the Persian Gulf are reportedly inching toward joining the fight against Iran, pushing oil prices higher.

items.title: 伊朗战争影响美国经济：通胀上升，经济增长放缓。
items.summary: 伊朗冲突已经对美国经济造成新的压力，公司报告称价格上涨、订单减少和就业率下降。
items.title_en: The Iran war spills over into the U.S. economy: Inflation rises and growth slows.
items.summary_en: The conflict with Iran has already put fresh stress on the U.S. economy, as companies report rising prices, fewer orders and a decline in employment.

items.title: 欧洲股市因伊朗战争不确定性而下跌
items.summary: 欧洲上市的股票周二下午跌落，投资者继续关注中东的发展。
items.title_en: European stocks dip as Iran war uncertainty lingers
items.summary_en: Shares listed in Europe dipped on Tuesday afternoon, as investors continue to monitor developments in the Middle East.

items.title: 10年期国债收益率微升，投资者因伊朗战争再次升温而心存疑虑。
items.summary: 10年期国债收益率周二上涨，因为石油市场的持续波动和中东局势的持续紧张使投资者保持谨慎。
items.title_en: 10-year Treasury yields edge higher as investors weigh renewed Iran war uncertainty
items.summary_en: The 10-year Treasury yield rose on Tuesday as renewed volatility in oil markets and lingering Middle East tensions kept investors on edge.

items.title: 美联储加息让人们担心，但伊朗冲突拖延了时间，借贷成本已经更高。
items.summary: 借贷成本的上升可以追溯到伊朗冲突爆发以来公债收益率的上升，但也与人工智能扩张所需的大量融资需求有关。
items.title_en: Fed rate hikes are a worry as Iran conflict drags on — but borrowing is already more expensive
items.summary_en: The uptick in borrowing costs can be traced to higher bond yields since the Iran conflict began in late February, but also to the large financing needs of the AI buildout

items.title: 伊朗在霍尔木兹海峡的袭击是“对每个国家的经济恐怖主义”，阿联酋石油CEO说。

items.summary_en: Sultan Ahmed Al Jaber, CEO of the UAE's state-owned oil company, said the Strait of Hormuz must reopen to resolve the supply shock.

items.summary_en: Former GM executive CEO Pamela Fletcher told CNBC "the faster path, and frankly, a big need, is out there in this defense space."

items.title: 英国对伊朗战争能源冲击作出回应，要求所有新建房屋安装太阳能电池板和热泵。
items.summary: 英国此举是对伊朗战争的回应，冲突导致了油价历史上最大的一次供应中断。

items.summary_en: The move comes as part of Britain's response to the Iran war, with the conflict triggering the largest supply disruption in the history of the oil market.
